text:
UK: Dragonite vs. Darmanitan! | Pokémon Horizons: Season 3 | Official Clip
It’s a Dragonite! 💥

Ult and Mega Sableye are battling Indi and Rubina’s Darmanitan when Ult’s mysterious Dusk Ball opens.
